title: Iran International: Draft MoU breaches 8 of 10 terms approved by Khamenei — insider Khanalizadeh claims
snippet: Mehdi Khanalizadeh, state TV pundit who accompanied Iran's Islamabad negotiating team, said draft MoU violates 8 of 10 conditions approved by Mojtaba Khamenei and contradicts SNSC ceasefire statement. Lawmaker Aboutorabi accused US of offering 'a lollipop' — $300B reconstruction fund without guarantees — for Hormuz reopening. Israeli sources say 'no indication' Khamenei has approved MoU terms. JPost: Khamenei non-approval is why Trump also hasn't decided.
tag_reason: 신규 — 이란 내부 인사이더의 MoU 구체적 위반 주장, 하메네이 비승인 이유 최초 상세 보도
